title: Evangelion Wind Symphony
wikitext:
{{Media Infobox
| name      = Evangelion Wind Symphony
| image     = [[Image:Evangelion Wind Symphony.jpg|200px]]
| publisher = {{Publisher|JP=King Records/Starchild}}
| release   = {{Release|JP=December 9, 2009}}
| media     = Audio CD
| author    = [[Shiro Sagisu]]
}}
''Evangelion Wind Symphony'' is a 2-CD album consisting of songs from the [[Neon Genesis Evangelion]] TV series set to brass instruments and performed by the Tokyo Kosei Wind Orchestra. The album came with a booklet about the music and CD-ROMs with the songs' sheet music in PDF form. It was released by STARCHILD on December 9, 2009 with catalog numbers KIZC-41, KIZC-42, KIZC-43 and KIZC-44 (the CD-ROMs have their own numbers).

Evangelion Wind Symphony
Publisher
  • Japan King Records/Starchild
Release Date
  • Japan December 9, 2009
Media Type Audio CD
Author Shiro Sagisu

Evangelion Wind Symphony is a 2-CD album consisting of songs from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series set to brass instruments and performed by the Tokyo Kosei Wind Orchestra. The album came with a booklet about the music and CD-ROMs with the songs' sheet music in PDF form. It was released by STARCHILD on December 9, 2009 with catalog numbers KIZC-41, KIZC-42, KIZC-43 and KIZC-44 (the CD-ROMs have their own numbers).

The album came with a booklet about the music and CD-ROMs with the songs' sheet music in PDF form.
